calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #10, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton Katz for Trustees/Petitioner.

The Court indicated that the Trust is not under court supervision and that the accountings are not subject to court approval. Counsel requested to have the two accounting petitions dismissed. The Court ordered the two petitions off calendar and dismissed. Counsel also requested to have the Petition for Probate set for hearing on November 28, 2012 to be taken off calendar and that he has discovered the former counsel has recorded the order.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
